title: What Is Really the Point of All of This?
author: Navees
summary: Churning takes up a lot of time and mental energy. So why do it? Here's how I spent a lot of it.
body_html:
Churning takes up a lot of time and mental energy. So why do it? Here's how I spent a lot of it.

  • TAP Portugal - A330 - 50,000 Chase UR points (Actual seat price $3000)
  • Sri Lankan Airlines - A330 - 80,000 AA miles (Actual seat price $4000)
  • Qantas - A380 - 110,000 AA miles (Actual seat price $12,000)

This was probably one of the highlights of any redemption flights I had ever taken. QF First lounge in Melb and a pre flight massage.
